examples: Across much of northern Australia, gamba grass from Africa is overrunning native savannah woodlands.
A Savannah cat is a crossbreed between a domestic cat and a medium-sized wild African cat called the Serval.
Horses were adopted by peoples of the West African savannah, and later their powerful cavalry forces allowed them to carve out large empires.
There, thick emerald forests give way to wild grasslands reminiscent of the African savannah.
But then, there were not many tobacconists in the African savannah where humanity evolved.
